column1: # ADMIN ROLE - Full Access (using regex patterns)
# APPRAISER ROLE - Owned and Assigned Items
# Read QC reviews for owned orders
# AI ASSISTANT — available to all authenticated roles
# CLIENT ORDER — placed by lender on an engagement
# (admin policies above are wildcard; these add manager/appraiser/qc_analyst)
# VENDOR ORDER — vendor-dispatched fulfillment work for a ClientOrder
# (admin policies above are wildcard; these add the operational roles)
# Vendor orders are read by the same audiences as legacy orders.
# Owned/assigned VendorOrder — appraiser sees only their own
